user_query: @employees/emp_001 what is the travel expense policy?
final_answer_preview:
Policy: International Travel Expense Policy

Employees traveling internationally for business may claim: flights (economy class for trips under 6 hours, business class for longer), hotels up to €200/night in Western Europe and €150/night elsewhere, meals up to €75/day. Submit all claims within 30 days of return via the HR portal. Receipts required for any individual expense over €25. Pre-approval
